header.note: The source node in most cases contains the sample message as written by the developer. If it looks like a dot-delimitted string such as "form.label.firstname", then the developer has not provided a default message.

trans-unit.resname: Customer group with ID :id does not exist
trans-unit.source: Customer group with ID :id does not exist
trans-unit.target: Customer group with ID :id does not exist
trans-unit.note: key: Customer group with ID :id does not exist
key: Missing ID for Customer Group
